title: poa marginata
intro: Poa marginata, also known as the mountain bluegrass, is a species of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Poa marginata include reducing inflammation, soothing digestive issues, and supporting the immune system. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are commonly used to harness its medicinal properties.
